chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5923 of 2022 Syed Aqeel Bukhari Versus M/s AGE & Sons (Pvt.) Ltd. & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 14.02.2024 None present. -.-.- Counsel for petitioner is not regular and punctual in appearance. He was called absent on 14.11.2022 when he was asked to satisfy the Court about maintainability of the petition followed by order dated 19.12.2023 when again he was called absent. Even today neither petitioner nor his counsel is in attendance. There is no intimation either. The matter is coming up on maintainability issue which has not yet been addressed. It appears that petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in the proceedings. Petition is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Judge Judge
